meta.title: Legacy Android apps — Dreambit Applications
meta.description: Archive of classic Android apps originally published under Dreambit Applications (2012–2016). Not maintained. Google Play links are provided where listings remain available.

hero.logoAlt: DreamBit — stylized D with B in negative space and DreamBit wordmark
hero.title: Dreambit Applications — legacy Android apps
hero.subtitle: Original Android titles from the Dreambit team era. Listed for history and transparency.
hero.unmaintained: These apps are not maintained. They may not run correctly on modern Android. Install and use at your own risk.
hero.brandNote: Dreambit Applications was the former publishing name. Zuki Apps hosts this page as a courtesy archive; active Zuki Apps products are listed separately on the home page.

hushGallery.title: Hush Gallery (original)
hushGallery.description: Original Dreambit-era private photo and video vault: hide and protect media with PIN lock and biometric auth (legacy listing; a newer Hush Gallery exists today). Text and icon from archived Play listing.

whistleCamera.title: Whistle Camera (original)
whistleCamera.description: Whistle to capture photos or video — filters, editing tools, shake to start video, front/rear camera and countdown. Icon and copy from archived Play listing.

navigUp.title: NavigUp
navigUp.description: Keeps your navigation app on top during calls (manual or auto mode); optional delay before bringing navigation back. Icon and description from archived Play listing.

worldCup2014.title: World Cup 2014 trivia game
worldCup2014.description: Trivia for the 2014 FIFA World Cup in Brazil — challenge friends, compare scores worldwide. Icon and copy from archived Play listing.

trickyRooms.title: Tricky Rooms
trickyRooms.description: Puzzle game — find what is wrong in each picture.

flipLight.title: Flip Light
flipLight.description: Flashlight with camera preview, zoom, long-press to capture a photo, flip phone or shake to control. Icon and copy from archived Play listing.

privacy.metaTitle: Privacy Policy — Legacy Dreambit Android apps | Zuki Apps
privacy.description: Official privacy policy for legacy Dreambit-era Android apps and the zukiapps.com dreambit-legacy archive. Developer: Zuki Apps. Contact email included. Describes data practices for the website and linked Google Play listings.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.titleSub: Legacy Dreambit Android applications & website archive
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy (“Policy”) applies to the dreambit-legacy pages on zukiapps.com (including this document and the public app list) and provides transparency about legacy Android applications originally published under the name Dreambit Applications. It is intended to satisfy app store requirements, including Google Play’s User Data policy, when you provide this URL as your privacy policy. If you install an app from Google Play, Google’s terms and the app’s store listing also apply. Read this Policy together with any in-app notices and the Data safety section on Google Play for the specific app you use.
privacy.s1b:
This website and this Privacy Policy are operated by Zuki Apps (“we”, “us”). Our contact email appears at the end of this Policy.

Scope: (1) Visitors to the dreambit-legacy section of zukiapps.com. (2) Users of the legacy Android applications listed below when those apps are obtained from Google Play or already installed on a device. This Policy describes our practices in plain language. Zuki Apps today does not ship updates to these historic Dreambit-era builds; listings may still be discoverable on Google Play for transparency. Always check the store listing for the developer name and Data safety form for the build you install.
privacy.s2t: Legacy apps and package names (Google Play)
privacy.s2b:
The following titles are the Dreambit-era legacy Android apps referenced on our archive. Where a public listing exists, the Android application ID is shown for clarity in Google Play Console and reviews:

• Hush Gallery (original) — com.dreambit.hushgallery — private photo and video gallery; may use storage and media permissions.
• Whistle Camera (original) — com.dreambit.whistlecamera — camera and whistle detection; may use camera, microphone, and related permissions.
• NavigUp — com.dreambit.navigup — navigation overlay helper; may use display and accessibility-related capabilities as described on the store listing.
• World Cup 2014 trivia game — com.dreambit.worldcuptrivia — casual trivia; may use network access if the build includes ads or analytics as declared on the listing.
• Tricky Rooms — puzzle game.
• Flip Light — com.dreambit.fliplight — flashlight utility; may use camera/flash permissions.

Exact permissions and data practices depend on the APK version offered on Google Play and may differ by device and Android version. Unmaintained apps may not run correctly on current Android versions.
privacy.s3t: Information we collect on this website (none)
privacy.s3b: When you browse the dreambit-legacy pages only: we do not operate login, accounts, or contact forms on these pages. We do not use advertising or analytics pixels on this archive section to collect personal data. We do not sell personal data. In other words, for this archive website section we do not collect personal information from visitors for tracking or marketing purposes. (General site-wide practices, if any, outside this section are governed by our main site policies if we publish them separately.)
privacy.s4t: The Android apps and your device
privacy.s4b: Legacy apps run on your device. Typical categories of information an app may access include: photos or media you choose (for gallery or camera apps), audio from the microphone (for whistle detection), storage for saving files, and device or OS features needed for the app to function. Such processing usually happens on the device. Whether an app transmits data to third parties (for example ad or analytics SDKs) depends on that specific build and what is declared on Google Play Data safety and in the app. Because these titles are unmaintained by us, you should rely on the current Play listing, in-app disclosures, and Google’s tools for the installed package.
privacy.s5b: Google Play and Google’s services are provided by Google LLC and partners under their terms and privacy policy. Device manufacturers and Android itself handle OS-level permissions. We do not control Google’s processing when you use their stores or services.
privacy.s6b: Website: there is no account database for this archive section tied to your visit. Apps: data retention on the device is under your control (for example uninstalling the app or clearing app data). Follow Google and device settings for backups and security.
privacy.s7b: You can stop using an app, revoke permissions in Android settings, or uninstall the app. For requests related to Google Play accounts or purchases, use Google’s support flows. For questions specifically about this Policy or the archive page, use the contact email below.
privacy.s8b: Some legacy titles were casual games. These apps are not directed specifically at children in a manner that replaces parental judgment. Parents and guardians should review each store listing, age rating, and permission prompts. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children through the dreambit-legacy website section as described in the “Information we collect on this website” section above.
privacy.s9b: We may update this Policy from time to time. The “Last updated” date at the top will change when we do. Continued use of the website after changes means you accept the updated Policy. If Google Play requires a specific URL, keep using this page so reviewers can see the latest version.
privacy.s10b: Questions about this Privacy Policy or the dreambit-legacy archive:

terms.metaTitle: Terms of Use — Legacy Dreambit Android apps | Zuki Apps
terms.description: Terms of use for the legacy Dreambit Applications Android archive on Zuki Apps.
terms.title: Terms of Use — Legacy Dreambit Android apps
terms.intro: By using this page or installing linked legacy software, you agree to the following.
terms.s1b: Legacy software is provided as-is, without warranties. Features may be broken; apps may be removed from stores without notice.
terms.s2b: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Zuki Apps is not liable for damages arising from use of unmaintained third-party or historic software obtained via linked stores.
terms.s3b: Google Play, device manufacturers, and OS vendors are independent; their terms govern downloads and platform behaviour.
terms.s4b: This informational page may be updated at any time.
